headline: Moody's Warns Indonesia Risks Grow Despite 2.85% Deficit Target
summary: Ratings agency says policy uncertainty, subsidies and weak revenue reforms continue to pressure Indonesia's credit outlook.

raw.headline: Moody's Warns Indonesia Risks Grow Despite 2.85% Deficit Target
raw.summary: Ratings agency says policy uncertainty, subsidies and weak revenue reforms continue to pressure Indonesia's credit outlook.

headline: Strength in Global Bond Issuance Volumes to Aid Moody's Q2 Earnings
summary: MCO's Q2 results may reflect strong global bond issuance, with investment-grade, high-yield and structured finance activity supporting revenue growth.

raw.headline: Strength in Global Bond Issuance Volumes to Aid Moody's Q2 Earnings
raw.summary: MCO's Q2 results may reflect strong global bond issuance, with investment-grade, high-yield and structured finance activity supporting revenue growth.

headline: Growth in AUM Balance Likely to Support Ameriprise's Q2 Earnings
summary: Growth in AUM and AUA balances could support AMP's Q2 results as higher fees are expected to lift revenues ahead of its July 23 earnings report.

raw.headline: Growth in AUM Balance Likely to Support Ameriprise's Q2 Earnings
raw.summary: Growth in AUM and AUA balances could support AMP's Q2 results as higher fees are expected to lift revenues ahead of its July 23 earnings report.

headline: Moody's (MCO) Reports Q2: Everything You Need To Know Ahead Of Earnings
summary: Credit rating agency Moody's (NYSE:MCO) will be announcing earnings results this Wednesday before market hours. Here’s what you need to know.
